title: NewNZ
description: A frozen wasteland survival with a luscious and lively underground with big caves, inner biomes and lost bunkers, followed by a vicious End and Nether. A step up and a Different kind of light into Vanilla Minecraft. Survival with friends is recommended.
body:
A modpack made for friends, play it if you want.

Vanilla Friendly pack with added difficulty into the game 
with a Frozen wasteland of a surface and deep and diverse
depths in the caves.

You awake in the cold, to see nothing but the crystal white snow. without such a crystal clear vision as to where you are. a constant snow storm is raining down and the surface is dead. However, Life finds a way, and it found a way in the depths of the earth. Underneath lies A jungle of biomes and forgotten places left by what was probably survivors who never made it. 
The surface is unforgiving, the underground is unforgiving, surely the rest of the world is fine right? well just 1 dive into the Nether and the End and you will truly be challenged, as if your life isnt already hard enough. will you live? or will you freeze to your very last breath?

This project is a modpack made solely around a joke between friends, but then we found it interesting to make a modpack about it. This modpack is meant to turn your game into a frozen wasteland with rough terrain and tough survival. however, the caves and the rest of the depths have been changed into a maze of caves that change in biome, with added people and villages within. The End and Nether has been changed to make the game more challenging to beat while there have also been more added motives to survival and what to work on such as custom weapons, custom armor and more.

Credits go to all the original creators of the mods in this modpack
